_meta.purpose: Tag products with 'Loading Docks' (and supporting 'Service yard and dock protection') in their fitForPurposeApplications where the original PRH-1009 entry omitted the explicit dock label. Authority: ASAFE_GroundWorks_PRH-1005 (which lists the dock-gate family with a 'dock-door zones' substrate note) and the ASAFE_ProductSuitability_PRH-1009 inclusion criteria for HGV-class capable barriers.
_meta.policy: Conservative interpretation: products that are HGV-class capable (≥7.5T vehicle suitability or 'Engine Counterbalance Heavy Duty Forklift Truck') AND whose catalog category is plausibly deployed at a loading-dock environment (perimeter traffic, dock-door height restrictors, dock-staging bollards, vehicle stops). Skip racking-only / pedestrian-only / cold-storage-only products with no dock-context evidence.

additions.comment: 20kJ heavy-duty FLT-rated traffic barrier — directly suited to dock-staging perimeter where ≥10T forklifts approach loading bays.
Heavy-duty FLT-rated traffic barrier; same family as Double Traffic+ minus the higher rail. Standard dock-staging perimeter.
Heavy-duty counterbalance class; appropriate for dock-zone traffic-pedestrian segregation.
Heavy Duty Topple Barrier family — explicitly rated for Heavy Duty Counterbalance Truck class; deployed at dock-edge approach to prevent topple at staging.
Same Heavy Duty Topple family; long span suits the dock-door perimeter.
Industrial door protection for HGV-class vehicles entering dock buildings — direct dock-door application.
Companion post for the height restrictor; same dock-door deployment.
PRH-1009 already lists 'Industrial door protection' + 'Goods In Goods Out' — these are loading-dock applications by definition.
Service-yard category vehicle stop; coach terminals are a dock-class loading environment.
Service-yard category vehicle stop; appropriate for car-class dock entries (parking-deck loading bays).
190mm OD bollard — same form factor as iFlex HD Bollard which already carries 'Service yard and dock protection'. Used for dock-perimeter pillar protection.
Cold-storage-rated 190mm bollard for cold-store dock entries (food/pharma temperature-controlled docks).
Pedestrian + traffic segregation family deployed alongside dock-door staging when foot traffic mingles with HGV/FLT.
Heavy-Duty Counterbalance Truck rated; suits internal goods-handling dock approaches where larger micro-barrier coverage is needed.
